Interface IPersistablePO

All Superinterfaces:
ProofOblInput
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractInfFlowPO, AbstractOperationPO, AbstractPO, BlockExecutionPO, DependencyContractPO, FunctionalBlockContractPO, FunctionalLoopContractPO, FunctionalOperationContractPO, InfFlowContractPO, LoopInvExecutionPO, ProgramMethodPO, ProgramMethodSubsetPO, SymbolicExecutionPO, TacletProofObligationInput, WdFunctionalBlockContractPO, WellDefinednessPO
public interface IPersistablePO extends ProofOblInput

This interface extends the standard proof obligation (ProofOblInput) with functionality to define the individual parameters which are required for loading and saving *.proof files.

During save process the ProofSaver calls method createLoaderConfig(). This proof obligation has to store all information in the given Properties which are required to reconstruct it. The class (Object.getClass()) of this class must be stored in the Properties with key PROPERTY_CLASS.

During load process the AbstractProblemLoader tries to execute a static method on the class defined via Properties key PROPERTY_CLASS with the following signature: public static LoadedPOContainer loadFrom(InitConfig initConfig, Properties properties) throws IOException The returned IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer contains the instantiated ProofOblInput together with the proof index.

See Also:
  • ProofSaver
  • AbstractProblemLoader

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer
    The class stored in a Properties instance via key must provide the static method with the following signature: public static LoadedPOContainer loadFrom(InitConfig initConfig, Properties properties) throws IOException This method is called by the AbstractProblemLoader to recreate a proof obligation.

    • PROPERTY_FILENAME

      static final String PROPERTY_FILENAME
      The key used to store the file name under which a PO is loaded. This key is set during loading by the loader and needs not be saved.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • createLoaderConfig

      Configuration createLoaderConfig() throws IOException
      This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
      Returns:
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • printProofObligation

      default boolean printProofObligation(PrintWriter ps, Proof proof) throws IOException
      Called to manifest the proof manifest the proof obligation configuration into the given PrintWriter If the method returns true, a \proofObligation statement was successfully written to the ps. Therefore, no \problem statement is printed.
      Returns:
      true if a \proofObligation was written successfully.
      Throws:
      IOException
